centroids.name: sequential_fifo
centroids.description: Return transactions in order [0,1,2,...n-1], no optimization

centroids.name: sequential_fifo_indexed
centroids.description: Return transactions in index order using simple array iteration

centroids.name: sequential_fifo_range
centroids.description: Return transactions in order using range-based iteration

centroids.name: sequential_fifo_enumerate
centroids.description: Return transactions in order with enumeration tracking

centroids.name: random_sample
centroids.description: Generate random permutations, evaluate each, keep best

centroids.name: random_sample_larger
centroids.description: Generate more random permutations with more evaluations

centroids.name: random_sample_smaller
centroids.description: Generate fewer random permutations, quick evaluation

centroids.name: random_sample_filtered
centroids.description: Generate random permutations, filter bad ones early, keep best

centroids.name: greedy_min_cost
centroids.description: Greedy: always pick next txn that minimizes incremental cost

centroids.name: greedy_min_cost_eager
centroids.description: Greedy with eager early termination when good candidate found

centroids.name: greedy_min_cost_full_scan
centroids.description: Greedy: full scan of all candidates each step

centroids.name: greedy_min_cost_cached
centroids.description: Greedy with cached cost computations for efficiency

centroids.name: greedy_sampled
centroids.description: Sample subset of remaining txns, pick best from sample

centroids.name: greedy_sampled_large
centroids.description: Sample larger subset of remaining txns, pick best from sample

centroids.name: greedy_sampled_small
centroids.description: Sample small subset of remaining txns, quick pick

centroids.name: greedy_sampled_adaptive
centroids.description: Adaptively adjust sample size based on remaining txn count

centroids.name: sorted_by_length
centroids.description: Sort transactions by length, schedule in sorted order

centroids.name: sorted_by_length_desc
centroids.description: Sort transactions by length descending, longest first

centroids.name: sorted_by_length_stable
centroids.description: Stable sort by length, preserve original order for ties

centroids.name: sorted_by_length_bucketed
centroids.description: Bucket sort by length ranges, schedule buckets in order

centroids.name: sorted_by_conflict_count
centroids.description: Count conflicts per txn, sort by conflict count

centroids.name: sorted_by_conflict_count_asc
centroids.description: Sort by conflict count ascending, least conflicts first

centroids.name: sorted_by_conflict_count_desc
centroids.description: Sort by conflict count descending, most conflicts first

centroids.name: sorted_by_conflict_count_weighted
centroids.description: Sort by weighted conflict count (read vs write weights)

centroids.name: conflict_graph_topo
centroids.description: Build conflict graph, topological sort on write dependencies

centroids.name: conflict_graph_topo_dfs
centroids.description: Build conflict graph, DFS-based topological sort

centroids.name: conflict_graph_topo_bfs
centroids.description: Build conflict graph, BFS-based Kahn's algorithm topo sort

centroids.name: conflict_graph_topo_cycle_aware
centroids.description: Topological sort with cycle detection and breaking

centroids.name: key_partitioning
centroids.description: Partition by key access, schedule partitions to minimize cross-conflict

centroids.name: key_partitioning_hash
centroids.description: Hash-based key partitioning, schedule partitions by hash range

centroids.name: key_partitioning_greedy
centroids.description: Greedily assign txns to partitions minimizing cross-partition conflicts

centroids.name: key_partitioning_balanced
centroids.description: Balanced key partitioning with even partition sizes

centroids.name: batch_nonconflicting
centroids.description: Group non-conflicting txns into batches, order batches greedily

centroids.name: batch_nonconflicting_large
centroids.description: Maximize batch sizes for non-conflicting groups

centroids.name: batch_nonconflicting_small
centroids.description: Create smaller batches for finer-grained conflict avoidance

centroids.name: batch_nonconflicting_dynamic
centroids.description: Dynamically adjust batch size based on conflict density

centroids.name: priority_queue_dynamic
centroids.description: Priority queue with dynamic conflict count updates

centroids.name: priority_queue_static
centroids.description: Priority queue with static initial priorities

centroids.name: priority_queue_lazy
centroids.description: Priority queue with lazy updates on extraction

centroids.name: priority_queue_fibonacci
centroids.description: Fibonacci heap priority queue for efficient decrease-key

centroids.name: hill_climb_swap
centroids.description: Start with greedy, hill climb via pairwise swaps

centroids.name: hill_climb_swap_first
centroids.description: Hill climb taking first improving swap found

centroids.name: hill_climb_swap_best
centroids.description: Hill climb taking best improving swap each iteration

centroids.name: hill_climb_swap_random
centroids.description: Hill climb with random swap selection among improvements

centroids.name: hill_climb_insert
centroids.description: Hill climb by removing and reinserting transactions

centroids.name: hill_climb_insert_first
centroids.description: Hill climb taking first improving insertion found

centroids.name: hill_climb_insert_best
centroids.description: Hill climb finding best insertion position each iteration

centroids.name: hill_climb_insert_bounded
centroids.description: Hill climb with bounded insertion distance

centroids.name: simulated_annealing
centroids.description: SA: accept worse swaps with decreasing probability

centroids.name: simulated_annealing_fast
centroids.description: SA with fast cooling schedule

centroids.name: simulated_annealing_slow
centroids.description: SA with slow cooling for more exploration

centroids.name: simulated_annealing_adaptive
centroids.description: SA with adaptive cooling based on acceptance rate

centroids.name: tabu_search
centroids.description: Tabu search: track recent moves, avoid revisiting

centroids.name: tabu_search_short
centroids.description: Tabu search with short tabu tenure

centroids.name: tabu_search_long
centroids.description: Tabu search with long tabu tenure for diversification

centroids.name: tabu_search_reactive
centroids.description: Reactive tabu search with dynamic tenure adjustment

centroids.name: multi_start_greedy
centroids.description: Run greedy from multiple random starting txns, keep best

centroids.name: multi_start_greedy_few
centroids.description: Few greedy starts from random txns

centroids.name: multi_start_greedy_many
centroids.description: Many greedy starts for better coverage

centroids.name: multi_start_greedy_diverse
centroids.description: Greedy starts from diverse starting points

centroids.name: lookahead_one
centroids.description: Greedy with 1-step lookahead: consider next txn impact

centroids.name: lookahead_one_pruned
centroids.description: 1-step lookahead with pruning of unlikely candidates

centroids.name: lookahead_one_sampled
centroids.description: 1-step lookahead on sampled future candidates

centroids.name: lookahead_one_cached
centroids.description: 1-step lookahead with cached lookahead costs

centroids.name: lookahead_two
centroids.description: Greedy with 2-step lookahead: evaluate 2 future placements

centroids.name: lookahead_two_pruned
centroids.description: 2-step lookahead with aggressive pruning

centroids.name: lookahead_two_sampled
centroids.description: 2-step lookahead on sampled future candidates

centroids.name: lookahead_two_bounded
centroids.description: 2-step lookahead with bounded search space

centroids.name: beam_search
centroids.description: Beam search: maintain k best partial schedules, expand greedily

centroids.name: beam_search_narrow
centroids.description: Narrow beam search with small beam width

centroids.name: beam_search_wide
centroids.description: Wide beam search with large beam width

centroids.name: beam_search_stochastic
centroids.description: Stochastic beam search with random selection among top candidates

centroids.name: genetic_crossover
centroids.description: Evolutionary: crossover schedules, mutate, select fittest

centroids.name: genetic_crossover_pmx
centroids.description: Genetic algorithm with PMX crossover operator

centroids.name: genetic_crossover_ox
centroids.description: Genetic algorithm with order crossover (OX)

centroids.name: genetic_crossover_edge
centroids.description: Genetic algorithm with edge recombination crossover

centroids.name: branch_bound
centroids.description: Branch and bound with cost lower bound pruning

centroids.name: branch_bound_depth_first
centroids.description: Branch and bound with depth-first traversal

centroids.name: branch_bound_best_first
centroids.description: Branch and bound with best-first node selection

centroids.name: branch_bound_limited
centroids.description: Branch and bound with node limit cutoff

centroids.name: dp_memoized
centroids.description: Dynamic programming with memoization on partial sequences

centroids.name: dp_memoized_lru
centroids.description: DP with LRU cache for bounded memory

centroids.name: dp_memoized_bitmask
centroids.description: DP with bitmask state representation

centroids.name: dp_memoized_partial
centroids.description: Partial DP with approximate state aggregation

centroids.name: write_conflict_priority
centroids.description: Prioritize by write conflict density (writes block more)

centroids.name: write_conflict_priority_high
centroids.description: Schedule high write-conflict txns first to clear blockers

centroids.name: write_conflict_priority_low
centroids.description: Schedule low write-conflict txns first for parallel potential

centroids.name: write_conflict_priority_weighted
centroids.description: Weight write conflicts by key hotness

centroids.name: read_write_interleave
centroids.description: Separate read-heavy vs write-heavy, interleave strategically

centroids.name: read_write_interleave_strict
centroids.description: Strict alternation between read-heavy and write-heavy

centroids.name: read_write_interleave_batch
centroids.description: Batch reads then batch writes in interleaved groups

centroids.name: read_write_interleave_adaptive
centroids.description: Adapt interleaving ratio based on workload mix

centroids.name: hot_key_aware
centroids.description: Identify hot keys, schedule to minimize hot key contention

centroids.name: hot_key_aware_spread
centroids.description: Spread hot key accesses apart in schedule

centroids.name: hot_key_aware_cluster
centroids.description: Cluster hot key accesses to minimize context switches

centroids.name: hot_key_aware_priority
centroids.description: Prioritize hot key transactions early

centroids.name: two_phase_construct_refine
centroids.description: Phase 1: fast greedy. Phase 2: local search refinement

centroids.name: two_phase_construct_refine_fast
centroids.description: Fast construction, brief refinement phase

centroids.name: two_phase_construct_refine_deep
centroids.description: Quick construction, deep refinement phase

centroids.name: two_phase_construct_refine_balanced
centroids.description: Balanced effort between construction and refinement

centroids.name: insertion_best_position
centroids.description: Insert each txn at position minimizing partial cost

centroids.name: insertion_best_position_front
centroids.description: Insert at best position, bias toward front of schedule

centroids.name: insertion_best_position_back
centroids.description: Insert at best position, bias toward back of schedule

centroids.name: insertion_best_position_random
centroids.description: Insert at random position among top-k best

centroids.name: cluster_by_keys
centroids.description: Cluster txns by key overlap, order clusters then within

centroids.name: cluster_by_keys_jaccard
centroids.description: Cluster by Jaccard similarity of key sets

centroids.name: cluster_by_keys_hierarchical
centroids.description: Hierarchical clustering by key overlap

centroids.name: cluster_by_keys_kmeans
centroids.description: K-means style clustering on key feature vectors

centroids.name: critical_path
centroids.description: Find critical path in dependency graph, prioritize critical txns

centroids.name: critical_path_longest
centroids.description: Critical path based on longest dependency chain

centroids.name: critical_path_weighted
centroids.description: Critical path with weighted edge costs

centroids.name: critical_path_slack
centroids.description: Critical path with slack time analysis

centroids.name: sliding_window_opt
centroids.description: Optimize within sliding window, advance window

centroids.name: sliding_window_opt_small
centroids.description: Small sliding window for fast local optimization

centroids.name: sliding_window_opt_large
centroids.description: Large sliding window for better optimization

centroids.name: sliding_window_opt_overlap
centroids.description: Overlapping sliding windows for smoother transitions

centroids.name: monte_carlo
centroids.description: Monte Carlo: sample orderings biased by heuristic scores

centroids.name: monte_carlo_uniform
centroids.description: Monte Carlo with uniform random sampling

centroids.name: monte_carlo_weighted
centroids.description: Monte Carlo with weighted sampling by heuristic

centroids.name: monte_carlo_importance
centroids.description: Monte Carlo with importance sampling

centroids.name: tournament_select
centroids.description: Tournament: compare random pairs, evolve winners

centroids.name: tournament_select_small
centroids.description: Tournament with small tournament size

centroids.name: tournament_select_large
centroids.description: Tournament with large tournament size for selection pressure

centroids.name: tournament_select_elitist
centroids.description: Elitist tournament preserving best solutions

centroids.name: adaptive_strategy
centroids.description: Choose strategy based on workload characteristics

centroids.name: adaptive_strategy_simple
centroids.description: Simple adaptive: choose between 2-3 strategies

centroids.name: adaptive_strategy_learned
centroids.description: Learned adaptive: use past performance to select strategy

centroids.name: adaptive_strategy_ensemble
centroids.description: Run multiple strategies, combine results

centroids.name: greedy_lookahead_hybrid
centroids.description: Greedy with selective lookahead on high-conflict decisions

centroids.name: greedy_lookahead_hybrid_threshold
centroids.description: Lookahead only when conflict score exceeds threshold

centroids.name: greedy_lookahead_hybrid_topk
centroids.description: Lookahead only on top-k conflicting candidates

centroids.name: greedy_lookahead_hybrid_adaptive
centroids.description: Adapt lookahead depth based on conflict density

centroids.name: cost_matrix_precompute
centroids.description: Precompute pairwise costs, use matrix for fast decisions

centroids.name: cost_matrix_precompute_sparse
centroids.description: Sparse cost matrix for memory efficiency

centroids.name: cost_matrix_precompute_approx
centroids.description: Approximate cost matrix with sampling

centroids.name: cost_matrix_precompute_lazy
centroids.description: Lazy cost matrix computed on demand

centroids.name: segment_and_merge
centroids.description: Divide txns into segments, optimize segments, merge

centroids.name: segment_and_merge_equal
centroids.description: Equal-sized segments for balanced optimization

centroids.name: segment_and_merge_conflict
centroids.description: Segment boundaries at low-conflict points

centroids.name: segment_and_merge_recursive
centroids.description: Recursive segment and merge (divide and conquer)

centroids.name: reverse_greedy
centroids.description: Build schedule backwards from end, greedy predecessors

centroids.name: reverse_greedy_min_cost
centroids.description: Reverse greedy minimizing predecessor cost

centroids.name: reverse_greedy_conflict
centroids.description: Reverse greedy by conflict reduction

centroids.name: reverse_greedy_combined
centroids.description: Combine forward and reverse greedy, pick best

centroids.name: bidir_construction
centroids.description: Build from both ends simultaneously, meet in middle

centroids.name: bidir_construction_greedy
centroids.description: Bidirectional greedy construction

centroids.name: bidir_construction_alternate
centroids.description: Alternate between front and back construction

centroids.name: bidir_construction_balanced
centroids.description: Balance effort between front and back based on costs

centroids.name: iterative_improvement
centroids.description: Repeatedly apply best single-move improvement until stuck

centroids.name: iterative_improvement_first
centroids.description: Take first improvement found each iteration

centroids.name: iterative_improvement_best
centroids.description: Find and apply best improvement each iteration

centroids.name: iterative_improvement_random
centroids.description: Random selection among improving moves

centroids.name: variable_neighborhood
centroids.description: VNS: switch between swap, insert, reverse neighborhoods

centroids.name: variable_neighborhood_basic
centroids.description: Basic VNS with two neighborhood types

centroids.name: variable_neighborhood_extended
centroids.description: Extended VNS with many neighborhood types

centroids.name: variable_neighborhood_reduced
centroids.description: Reduced VNS with shaking and local search

centroids.name: exhaustive_small
centroids.description: Try all permutations for small n, fallback for large n

centroids.name: exhaustive_small_pruned
centroids.description: Exhaustive with early pruning on partial cost

centroids.name: exhaustive_small_bounded
centroids.description: Exhaustive with iteration count bound

centroids.name: exhaustive_small_hybrid
centroids.description: Exhaustive for tiny n, heuristic for larger n
